result:
**Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again**

We've all been there — a new doc opens, the cursor blinks, and suddenly the simplest idea feels impossible to start. Blank pages are one of the most common reasons good thinking stalls, and we kept hearing the same thing from you: the hardest part isn't writing, it's beginning. That's why we built Smart Drafts, a gentler on-ramp into every document you create.

Here's how it works. When you open a new doc and give it a title, you'll see a single "Suggest outline" button at the top. One click, and Smart Drafts generates a tailored outline based on your title and the context of your recent work — the projects you've been in, the docs you've been writing, the shape of your team's output. It's not a template; it's a starting point that already knows something about what you're trying to do. Keep what's useful, rewrite what isn't, and you're off.

This is just the first step. Next up: custom voice training, so Smart Drafts doesn't just understand *what* you write about, but *how* you write — your cadence, your structure, your turns of phrase. We'll share more soon. In the meantime, open a new doc and give Smart Drafts a try — we think you'll feel the difference on the very first one.
